title: [CI:DOCS]  Add macos build to ci
body:
Adding a mac build to ci for native builds

Signed-off-by: Ashley Cui <acui@redhat.com>

comments.body: @cevich PTAL, its super simple, but it works and it builds and it uploads the binary!! let me know if anything else should be included

Note: This isn't signed, nor an official "installer", but it's a step in the right direction.  Injecting "bad things" into the build appears to be impossible w/o the oversight of a PR, by compromising the Cirrus-CI Mac VMs, or DNS somehow.  So we're fairly safe.  Next step is figuring out the signing and installer-maker part.

[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *ashley-cui*, *cevich*, *rhatdan* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fpodman). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/master/OWNERS)~~ [rhatdan] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
